notes: Attempted to reproduce DllNotFoundException for libSkiaSharp in Blazor WASM on .NET 10. Tested with SkiaSharp 3.116.1 and 3.119.2 on SDK 10.0.102 (macOS arm64). Both versions rendered successfully with zero browser console errors. Also tested without WasmBuildNative — still worked. The reporter filed this on Dec 21, 2025 and was likely using an earlier .NET 10 preview SDK with emscripten ABI incompatibilities that have since been resolved in SDK 10.0.102. A commenter confirms this is a duplicate of #3422.

versionResults.notes: Rendered successfully on .NET 10 SDK 10.0.102. No DllNotFoundException. Browser console showed SUCCESS message.
Also rendered successfully. No errors in browser console.

corrections.corrected: This is a Blazor WASM (os/WASM) issue, not Windows Classic. The auto-triage misclassified the platform.

proposedResponse.body:
Thanks for the report. We attempted to reproduce this on macOS arm64 with .NET SDK 10.0.102 using both SkiaSharp 3.116.1 and 3.119.2, but were unable to observe the `DllNotFoundException`.

Both versions rendered successfully in a Blazor WASM app targeting `net10.0`, with no browser console errors.

This issue was filed in December 2025 — could you confirm which .NET 10 SDK version you were using? If you were on an earlier preview SDK, the emscripten toolchain may have had ABI incompatibilities that have since been resolved in SDK 10.0.102.

Could you share the following to help us investigate further?
- Output of `dotnet --info` (run outside any repo with a `global.json`)
- Your `.csproj` file
- Whether you have the `wasm-tools` workload installed (`dotnet workload list`)

Also noted: a commenter identified this as a duplicate of #3422.

actionability.reason: DllNotFoundException could not be reproduced on .NET 10 SDK 10.0.102 with either SkiaSharp 3.116.1 or 3.119.2. The issue was filed Dec 2025, likely against an earlier .NET 10 preview SDK with emscripten ABI incompatibilities. The reporter may have been using a preview SDK that has since been updated. Need to confirm reporter's exact SDK version.

actions.description: Fix platform label from Windows-Classic to WASM — this is a Blazor WASM issue
